_comment: Reminders for reservations and birthdays. Enroll friends via POST /api/reminders/:id/enroll/:friendId with targetDate.

reminders.name: 予約リマインド
reminders.description: 予約日の前日と当日にリマインドメッセージ配信

steps.messageContent:
【予約リマインド】

__RESTAURANT_NAME__です。
明日のご予約を確認いたします。

お時間の変更やキャンセルは「予約変更」と送ってください。

ご来店をお待ちしております!

{"type":"bubble","body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"本日のご予約","weight":"bold","size":"lg"},{"type":"separator","margin":"md"},{"type":"text","text":"まもなくお時間です。\nお気をつけてお越しください。","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"住所: __ADDRESS__","size":"xs","color":"#999999","margin":"md","wrap":true}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"uri","label":"地図で確認","uri":"__MAP_URL__"},"style":"primary","color":"#EF4444"}]}}

reminders.name: 誕生日クーポン配信
reminders.description: 誕生日の3日前に特別クーポン配信

steps.messageContent: {"type":"bubble","body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"お誕生日おめでとうございます!","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"__RESTAURANT_NAME__から\nバースデー特典をプレゼント!","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","backgroundColor":"#FDE68A","cornerRadius":"md","paddingAll":"16px","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"Birthday Special","weight":"bold","size":"md","color":"#92400E"},{"type":"text","text":"__BIRTHDAY_COUPON_DETAIL__","size":"lg","weight":"bold","color":"#B45309","margin":"sm"},{"type":"text","text":"誕生日月中有効","size":"xs","color":"#92400E","margin":"sm"}]}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"予約する","text":"予約する"},"style":"primary","color":"#EF4444"}]}}

お誕生日おめでとうございます!

__RESTAURANT_NAME__スタッフ一同よりお祝い申し上げます。

バースデークーポンはお忘れなく!
